---
title: "Team Sansasyonel"
sidebar: false 
---

This is our project webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow our project activities.

This is our template.

# Team Members

1.  Kayra Yaltırık https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-spring2026-kayrayltrk/

2.  İlhan Emre Can https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-spring2026-ilhanemrecan/

3.  Arda Tüylüoğlu https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-spring2026-ardatuyluoglulab/


# Project Topic

# Data Set
